reviews.comment:
No es 24 hs. Abre tarde. En época de turismo he visto muchas personas que esperaban encontrar un lugar donde desayunar y debieron is a otro lugar. La atención deja bastante que desear. No se compara con otras full

(Translated by Google)
It's not open 24 hours a day. It opens late. During peak tourist season, I've seen many people hoping to find a place to have breakfast and having to go somewhere else. The service leaves a lot to be desired. It's not comparable to other full-service restaurants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4406352797559943045/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzb3ZQU29RRRAB
